examples: He picked the dog up by the scruff of the neck.
She grabbed him by the scruff of the neck and threw him out.
The only sound was the soft scruff of their feet upon the steps.
Contepomi then took centre-stage, grabbing the game by the scruff of the neck to help guide his side to victory.
The Welsh side then took the game by the scruff of the neck and that pressure almost resulted in the first try of the game.
